items.name: Sidebar + Main
items.description: Collapsible sidebar with header bar and scrollable main content area. Used by saas-dashboard, financial-dashboard, workbench, ecommerce (account pages).

items.name: Right Sidebar
items.description: Main content with a right-side navigation panel. Useful for settings, documentation sidebars, or inspector layouts.

items.name: Sidebar + Main + Footer
items.description: Sidebar layout with a persistent footer bar. Used for apps needing status bars or action footers.

items.name: Sidebar + Aside
items.description: Three-column layout with left navigation and right inspector/detail panel. Used for admin dashboards, email clients, IDE-style apps.

items.name: Top Nav + Main
items.description: Horizontal navigation bar with full-width main content below. Used by ecommerce (storefront), portfolio, content-site.

items.name: Top Nav + Footer
items.description: Horizontal nav with main content and a persistent footer. Used for marketing sites, documentation with ToC footer.

items.name: Centered
items.description: Centered card on a background. Used for auth flows (login, register, forgot password) across all archetypes.

items.name: Full Bleed
items.description: No persistent navigation. Scroll-driven hero-first layout. Used by portfolio landing pages.

items.name: Minimal Header
items.description: Slim header with centered content below. Used for checkout flows, focused task pages.

items.name: Top Nav + Sidebar
items.description: Full-width header spanning both columns, with left sidebar navigation below. Combines top branding with sidebar navigation depth.

items.name: Workspace Aside
items.description: Three-column layout for collaborative editing with page tree navigation, document editor body, and comment/activity sidebar. Used by document-editor archetype for real-time collaboration.

items.name: Terminal Split
items.description: Terminal-style layout with status bar, resizable split panes, and hotkey bar. Optimized for CLI tool interfaces with monospace typography and ASCII borders.

items.name: Chat Portal
items.description: AI chatbot layout with collapsible conversation sidebar and anchored input. Used by ai-chatbot archetype for chat-first applications.
